name: Archipelago Luminary
short_description: „ÄäArchipelago: Luminary„Äã is a minimalist 2D tower defense game, where players must strategically plan the construction of turrets and manage resources to fend off waves of enemy attacks. Across 14 levels, players fight back continuously‚Äîfrom the last sanctuary to former territories.
detailed_description:
‚Äã‚ÄãStory‚Äã‚Äã
One night, a single light fell into the northern sea. From that moment on, endless monsters emerged from the depths. The people of the Northern Kingdom retreated, step by step, until only their last sanctuary remained‚Äîuntil humanity built its first turret...

‚Äã‚ÄãOverview‚Äã‚Äã
Archipelago Luminary is a minimalist 2D tower defense game inspired by Plants vs. Zombies. Players must strategically construct turrets and manage resources to withstand waves of enemies. Across 14 levels, fight back‚Äîfrom the final refuge to lost territories‚Äîuntil uncovering the truth behind the Luminary.

‚Äã‚ÄãArt & Narrative‚Äã‚Äã
In its stark black-and-white aesthetic, color becomes a rare treasure‚Äîuntil it floods the battlefield.
Piece together fragmented lore and key items to reconstruct a forgotten story.

‚Äã‚ÄãGameplay‚Äã‚Äã

  • ‚Äã‚Äã14+ turret types‚Äã‚Äã, blending classic design with escalating costs‚Äîforcing tough choices.

  • ‚Äã‚Äã10+ enemy variants‚Äã‚Äã, each with unique abilities, in increasingly frenzied waves where victory hangs by a thread.

  • ‚Äã‚Äã14 maps‚Äã‚Äã, evolving from simple lanes to intricate paths, drawing you closer to the divine.

‚Äã‚ÄãAudience‚Äã‚Äã

  • For players weary of 3D spectacle, this streamlined 2D defense game offers respite.

  • For lore hunters who relish piecing together mysteries, the narrative unfolds through subtle fragments.

  • Levels average under 10 minutes (if all goes well), with no forced progression‚Äîplay anytime.

‚Äã‚ÄãInspiration‚Äã‚Äã
Archipelago Luminary owes its existence to Gove‚Äôs prior "üí©-masterpiece" LightingForYou.
"Archipelago" (Greek for "scattered islands") mirrors the fractured world, while "Luminary" illuminates the central mystery.
(Yes, the official English title is Archipelago Luminary.)
